evals.name: TikTok post when user is not logged in
evals.prompt: Use the tiktokpost skill to upload /Desktop/promo_clip.mp4 to TikTok with the description 'Summer sale is here! 50% off everything. Link in bio.'
evals.expected_output: A description of the workflow including opening Chrome, navigating to TikTok website, handling login if not already logged in, uploading the video, and entering the description

assertions.text: The output mentions navigating to the TikTok website
The output includes a step about logging in or checking login status
The output mentions uploading or selecting the video file promo_clip.mp4
The output references adding the description or caption text provided

evals.name: TikTok post skill self-description
evals.prompt: What does the tiktokpost skill do?
evals.expected_output: A clear description of the skill's functionality: opening Chrome, going to TikTok, logging in, clicking New Video, and posting a video file

assertions.text: The output mentions Chrome browser as the tool used
The output mentions TikTok as the target platform
The output describes a login or authentication step
The output describes clicking 'New Video' or initiating an upload on TikTok
